name: Pupukea Tide Pools
tagline: Sheltered tide pools perfect for a mellow snorkel right next to Shark's Cove.
parking: Free lot across from Pupukea Beach Park (shared with Shark's Cove); fills by 9am in summer
bestTime: Summer only (May–Sep); low tide reveals the best pools; mornings are calmest
talkStory: These tide pools sit just south of Shark's Cove and are way more approachable for families and beginners. The shallow pools trap fish, sea cucumbers, and small eels when the tide drops. Wear reef shoes — the lava rock is sharp and slippery. In summer the outer pools connect to the open ocean and you can snorkel a wider area. Winter waves completely wash over this area so it is strictly a summer activity.
